steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: Sentence 1: above the Kármán line, an aircraft can no longer stay aloft via lift. Sentence 2: it sustains flight by velocity instead. The second sentence describes a replacement for the failed mechanism — not an example, not a concession.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content:
"Instead" signals replacement: lift fails, so velocity takes over.

(A) "Regardless" implies same outcome despite something. (B) "For instance" wants an example. (C) "Granted" concedes a counterpoint. None fits replacement.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
